settings.title: Session Cookie
settings.desc: Open ubereats.com → DevTools → Network → find 'getActiveOrdersV1' → Request Headers → copy the full 'cookie' value here

settings.title: CSRF Token
settings.desc: From the same request headers, copy the 'x-csrf-token' value here

settings.title: Locale
settings.desc: Your Uber Eats region locale code

settings.title: Start Polling Hour (24h)
settings.desc: Begin checking for active orders at this hour. e.g. 17 = 5:00 PM

settings.title: Stop Polling Hour (24h)
settings.desc: Stop background polling after this hour. e.g. 23 = 11:00 PM
